creator: rkoberman@gmail.com
text:
When attempting to suspend, the display swithe from X to vt, but did not turn off. The power light was flashing slowly, as it does when suspended, but pressing it did not resume the session and after sitting for a few minutes, the system paniced and rebooted.

I have a core dump.

System is ThinkPad 520, Sandy Bridge.
FreeBSD rogue 12.0-STABLE FreeBSD 12.0-STABLE r347635 GENERIC_4BSD  amd64
drm-fbsd12.0-kmod-4.16.g20190430

From dmesg:
vgapci0: child drmn0 requested pci_disable_io
vgapci0: child drmn0 requested pci_disable_io

acpi0: cleared fixed power button status
vgapci0: child drmn0 requested pci_set_powerstate
